programme.title: Welcome To The Darkness
programme.desc: In 2003, British band The Darkness took the world by storm, then at the height of their fame, they split up. 20 years on, they tell their story. 2023. UK. Director: Simon Emmett.

programme.title: Descendent
programme.desc: A mysterious light appears in the sky causing an LA school guard to experience strange visions. 2025. USA. Director: Peter Cilella. Starring: Sarah Bolger, Ross Marquand.

programme.title: Queens
programme.desc: An estranged father's re-enters the picture as a mother and three daughtersflee political tensions in Lima. 2024. Iceland. Director: Klaudia Reynicke. Starring: Abril Gjurinovic, Luana Vega.

programme.title: Somersault
programme.desc: Forced to flee her hometown, Heidy lands in the Australian alps. What will her new experiences teach her? 2004. Australia. Director: Cate Shortland. Starring: Abbie Cornish, Sam Worthington.

programme.title: Grand Tour
programme.desc: Edward, gets cold feet after his bride-to-be Molly arrives for their wedding. 2024. Portugal, Italy. Director: Miguel Gomes. Starring: Goncalo Waddington, Crista Alfaiate.

programme.title: Mobile 101
